channel.title: Posts on Leopold Gregor Goedhart
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Leopold Gregor Goedhart

item.title: Book Recommendations
item.description: My Book Recommendations Books I have already read Love and Math - Edward Frenkel Only read if you have some university math knowledge! Read if interested in Group Theory! Read if interested in academic antisemitism in the late Soviet Union Books I am going to read Joan Didion - Play It as It Lies Dr. Kevin Dutton - The Wisdom of Psychopaths Steven Novella - The Skeptics’ Guide to the Universe William Egginton - The Rigor of Angels Jacob L.

item.title: The Ultimate Way To Read Textbooks
item.description: The Ultimate Way To Read Textbooks Repeat for all chapters: Flip through each page in the chapter (yields info about what to look for, the structure and other subconscious benefits) Read the questions at the end of the chapter (Baader-Meinhof Phenomenon) Read bold words in the chapter (titles, subtitles, subsubtitles) to get an even better understanding of the structure Read the first and last sentence of each paragraph (first sentence gives an indication on what the rest of the paragraph is about; the last sentence sums up the important information) Read through the chapter and take notes (brings everything together and lets you connect the dots)
